pages.title: Host · Start screen
pages.description: The first screen the organiser sees when creating a session.

fields.label: Heading
fields.value: Surface, examine, and better understand how the everyday interactions of your team shape your culture.

fields.label: Intro paragraph
fields.value: Create a session, put the QR code on a screen, and everyone answers individually. All answers are anonymous. You'll get one individual score and a shared team score, including where you are now and where you want to go.

pages.title: Host · Lobby / join screen
pages.description: Shown while teammates scan the QR code and join.

fields.label: Intro paragraph
fields.value: Everyone scans this, answers on their phone, and it stays anonymous.

fields.label: Manual address hint
fields.value: Or go to this address and enter the code:

fields.label: Live count hint
fields.value: Updates live as people complete it.

pages.title: Host · Team results screen
pages.description: The shared read-out of the team's culture.

fields.label: Value scores hint
fields.value: Pooled from everyone's answers. The bar is the team's score; the chip shows how much you agree with each other.

fields.label: Word joining the split value names
Disagreement sentence (after the value names)
fields.value: Some of you feel it's strong here and some don't — usually the most useful thing to talk about.

pages.title: Player · Intro screen
pages.description: What a teammate sees right after joining, before the quiz.

fields.label: Eyebrow prefix (team name is added after)
Intro paragraph
fields.value: About 14 quick questions — some about how you'd respond, some about what usually happens on your team. It's completely anonymous, and it rolls up into one team result.

fields.label: Privacy hint
fields.value: Answer honestly — nobody sees your individual answers.

pages.title: Player · Session not found
pages.description: Shown when a join code doesn't match an open session.

fields.label: Intro paragraph
fields.value: Double-check the code with whoever's running it, or scan the QR code again.

pages.title: Player · Quiz questions
pages.description: Tags and hints shown on each question (the questions themselves live in the Question bank).

fields.label: Hint under personal questions
fields.value: Pick the one closest to what you'd really do — not the "right" answer.

fields.label: Hint under team questions
fields.value: Answer honestly about how things usually go — there's no wrong answer.

pages.title: Player · Thanks screen
pages.description: Shown after a teammate submits their answers.

fields.label: Confirmation sentence (before team name)
fields.value: Your answers are anonymous. They've been added to

fields.label: Personal read hint
fields.value: A quick read on your own answers (only you see this):

fields.label: Closing note
fields.value: The full team picture shows up on the shared screen once everyone's done. Hand the device back or pass the code to the next teammate.
